General.Name: Kingdee International Software Group Co Ltd
General.Description: Kingdee International Software Group Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the enterprise resource planning business. The company operates through Cloud Services Business; ERP Business; and Investment segments. The Cloud services Business segment provides enterprise cloud services, small and micro business finance cloud services, and industry cloud services. The ERP Business segment sells software and hardware products; and provides software solution consulting, maintenance, upgrade, and other supporting services, as well as software implementation services. The Investment segment invests in properties; and office buildings. It designs, develops, manufactures, and sells software and hardware products; and provides software-related and online financial intermediation services. It serves enterprises, government agencies, and other organizations worldwide. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
